definitions.add:
npgsql FirebirdSQL
SELECT DISTINCT vp.ent_id, n.name_given, n.name_family, ad.addr_country, ad.addr_county, ad.addr_state, ad.addr_city, ad.addr_street, dob as birth_date, gender, reg.act_time AS reg_date, reg.type AS reg_type, marital_sts, living_arr, bp_name.name AS birthplace, COALESCE(reg_name.name, 'Other') AS registration, asn_name.name AS assigned FROM vw_pat_tbl vp INNER JOIN act_tbl AS reg ON (vp.reg_act = reg.act_id) -- WE ONLY WANT PATIENTS THAT HAVE BEEN REGISTERED NOT THOSE FROM AN MPI LEFT JOIN ent_addr_tbl AS ad ON (ad.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND ad.addr_type = 'HomeAddress') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl AS n ON (n.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND n.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl bp_name ON (bp_name.ent_id = birthplace AND bp_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl reg_name ON (reg_name.ent_id = registration_facility AND reg_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl asn_name ON (asn_name.ent_id = assigned_facility AND asn_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') WHERE (${registration_facility}::UUID IS NULL OR registration_facility = ${registration_facility}::UUID) AND (${assigned_facility}::UUID IS NULL OR assigned_facility = ${assigned_facility}::UUID) AND reg.act_time BETWEEN ${reg_from} AND ${reg_to}

sqlite
SELECT DISTINCT vp.ent_id, n.name_given, n.name_family, ad.addr_country, ad.addr_county, ad.addr_state, ad.addr_city, ad.addr_street, dob as birth_date, gender, reg.act_time AS reg_date, reg.type AS reg_type, marital_sts, living_arr, bp_name.name AS birthplace, COALESCE(reg_name.name, 'Other') AS registration, asn_name.name AS assigned FROM vw_pat_tbl vp INNER JOIN act_tbl AS reg ON (vp.reg_act = reg.act_id) -- WE ONLY WANT PATIENTS THAT HAVE BEEN REGISTERED NOT THOSE FROM AN MPI LEFT JOIN ent_addr_tbl AS ad ON (ad.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND ad.addr_type = 'HomeAddress') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl AS n ON (n.ent_id = vp.ent_id AND n.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl bp_name ON (bp_name.ent_id = birthplace AND bp_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl reg_name ON (reg_name.ent_id = registration_facility AND reg_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') LEFT JOIN ent_name_tbl asn_name ON (asn_name.ent_id = assigned_facility AND asn_name.use_type = 'OfficialRecord') WHERE (${registration_facility} IS NULL OR registration_facility = ${registration_facility}) AND (${assigned_facility} IS NULL OR assigned_facility = ${assigned_facility}) AND reg.act_time BETWEEN ${reg_from} AND ${reg_to}
